coverage.note: Measured coverage: line/statement coverage is covered_lines / num_statements; combined_percent is coverage.py's line-plus-branch aggregate. The 100% figure applies only to audit-finding closure.
coverage.scope: src/x86decomp and test-suite/src/x86decomp_testkit under the complete 258-test monolithic run

findings.change: Regenerated deterministic root and standalone test-suite SHA-256 manifests after all remediation artifacts were written.
Removed the machine-local root harness configuration that exposed absolute user paths and environment data.
findings.evidence: x86decomp-test.json absent; root ignore rule added

findings.change: Kept build outputs, caches, downloaded tools, and harness results outside the release tree and expanded clean rules.
Aligned root-level harness output/config/install paths with ignore and clean rules.
findings.evidence: .gitignore; README/CI invocation paths are now safely ignored

findings.change: Kept distribution artifacts out of the source tree, rebuilt wheel/sdist externally, byte-compared packaged source to the current tree, and clean-installed both entry points.
findings.evidence: external build verification; 141 wheel and 141 sdist package files matched

findings.change: Completed the entire collected test inventory both in isolated partitions and monolithically with no failures, errors, or skips.
Replaced audited template and repeated-verb docstrings and added a reproducible quality-aware docstring audit.
findings.evidence: 212 modules, 160 classes, 1,474 functions/methods; zero missing/template/repeated defects

findings.change: Added a source-controlled MkDocs Material site, docs dependency, navigation, strict build gate, and CI step.
Moved the repeated adapter-capability statement to one canonical page and replaced copied prose with context-specific references.
Made contracts.py the canonical implementation for hashing, JSON, time, path containment, and atomic writes; util.py now preserves compatibility through delegation.
Routed PDB and MSVC metadata bounded reads through BinaryReader, including bounded string reads with returned end offsets.
Extracted width-parameterized import-thunk and TLS-callback walkers shared by PE32 and PE32+ parsers.
Added an executable hash-based synchronization gate for all 24 duplicated package-data corpus sources.
Added an explicit private vulnerability-reporting address, subject convention, required evidence, and disclosure flow.
Did not restore the stale prior audit report; added this disposition/remediation report tied to current verification evidence.
Made VerificationStatus a runtime output of claim verification.
Unified expected CLI failures around X86DecompError so domain errors emit structured JSON instead of tracebacks.
Migrated the root CLI to shared run_cli handling, including OSError and subprocess errors with exit status 2.
findings.evidence: cli.py main; missing-file JSON regression test

findings.change: Added a specific help summary for every root command, including dynamically registered MCP commands.
Collapsed the two ContractError definitions into one class that remains compatible with X86DecompError and ValueError catches.
findings.evidence: errors.py canonical class; contracts.py import; identity regression test

findings.change: Memoized canonical parser discovery, route generation, and group generation with process-local LRU caches.
findings.evidence: canonical.py cache decorators and cache-hit regression test

findings.change: Runs ad-hoc SELECT statements on a dedicated read-only SQLite connection with wall-clock interruption and a 10,000-row default cap.
findings.evidence: analysis_db.py; mutation and row-bound regression tests

findings.change: Rejects every workflow function identifier outside the exact pe-rva:XXXXXXXX grammar before path construction.
findings.evidence: workflow.py anchored regex; traversal regression test

findings.change: Requires explicit --allow-remote authorization before binding the unauthenticated read-only service to a non-loopback address.
findings.evidence: service.py and CLI flag; remote-bind regression test

gates.source_manifests: generated and verified after report generation

tests.final_exact_partition_replay: 258/258 passed; 0 failures; 0 errors; 0 skipped; 86/86 JUnit partitions reconciled
tests.final_post_packaging_replay: 258/258 passed; 0 failures; 0 errors; 0 skipped across 6 reconciled groups
